description_long: This object is a plush toy resembling a stylized rabbit or bunny, characterized by two long, segmented ears and a segmented body structure. The toy has a rounded head with two distinct eyes, one of which is a prominent red color, giving it a slightly mechanical or animatronic appearance. Its arms and legs are composed of rounded, jointed segments, and the hands and feet are simplified, with the feet being larger and more defined. The surface appears to be soft and matte, typical of stuffed toys, and the overall form is slightly exaggerated and cartoonish. The toy is entirely dark in color, with the exception of the single red eye, which stands out as a striking feature. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy.
description: A dark, segmented plush rabbit toy with long ears and a single red eye, featuring a soft, matte surface and a cartoonish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face with two long ears, both eyes (one red), and outstretched segmented arms.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the length of the ears, and the segmented limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ears, and body, with both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the head, ears, and limbs from the other side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with two round eyes, one of which is red and prominent. There is no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving the toy a blank, slightly mechanical look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms extended outward and both legs straight, ears pointing upward.
